name: Thiha Kyaw
title: Software Engineer / Backend Engineer
summary: A software engineer with six years of experience as a Backend Engineer who transitioned to a Full-stack Engineer role two years ago, currently based in Bangkok.

Experienced in developing high-performance APIs with scalable, low-resource-consumption code that runs reliably. I have worked as a backend engineer in Bulk SMS services, Social Media, Automobile, Insurance, AdTech, and E-commerce platforms, and I am currently working as a full-stack engineer at a company that specializes in artificial intelligence (AI), data science, and digital transformation solutions for businesses.
I primarily use PHP and JavaScript. I am experienced in adapting to new programming languages and technology stacks.

projects.name: Renewable Energy Acceleration Platform
projects.description: Digital marketplace for renewable energy services and green energy certificates. Enabled businesses, investors, and producers to engage with clean energy projects efficiently. Focused on streamlined transactions and structured project workflows.

projects.name: Sertis Careers Website
projects.description: Company career portal for managing job postings and applications. Improved recruitment workflows and candidate experience. Implemented responsive UI, secure authentication, and structured applicant data management.

projects.name: Recruitis
projects.description: Recruitment platform for job posting and applicant tracking. Delivered modern UX with optimized performance. Supported hiring workflows for growing organizations.

projects.name: Renewable Energy Trading Platform
projects.description: Maintained and enhanced a mission-critical core trading feature. Ensured compatibility with existing architecture and optimized performance. Handled production stability, bug fixes, and cross-team deployments.

projects.name: Knowledge Management AI Chatbot
projects.description: AI-powered chatbot for retrieving documents and internal knowledge via natural language. Integrated LLM services with document retrieval systems. Improved response accuracy, scalability, and system performance.

projects.name: BrikL E-commerce Platform

projects.name: Keyword App
projects.description: The ReverseAds Keyword web app provides keyword and competitive research tools to help optimize advertising campaign targeting. Contributed to the development and maintenance of core features, ensuring reliable performance and accurate data processing.

projects.name: Carro Ask

projects.name: Carro Anywhere
projects.description: Singapore's first contactless car showroom. Responsible for WebSocket-related development, including setting up WebSocket servers and integrating real-time communication features.

projects.name: Covered
projects.description: A usage-based car insurance and maintenance platform. Led backend development, heavily involved in integrating insurance vendor APIs for quoting, subscription, and payment processing. Communicated directly with insurance vendors for new feature integrations.

projects.name: TripleSMS
